estimateDate.description: Date of estimate expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16598](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16598)

buyCount.description: The number of Buy ratings taken into account in the calculation of a consensus. This information is shown only for a 100-day consensus.

overweightCount.description: The number of Overweight ratings taken into account in the calculation of a consensus. This information is shown only for a 100-day consensus.

holdCount.description: The number of Hold ratings taken into account in the calculation of a consensus. This information is shown only for a 100-day consensus.

underweightCount.description: The number of Underweight ratings taken into account in the calculation of a consensus. This information is shown only for a 100-day consensus.

sellCount.description: The number of Sell ratings taken into account in the calculation of a consensus. This information is shown only for a 100-day consensus.

ratingsNestTotal.description: The total number of ratings taken into account in the calculation of a consensus. This information is shown only for a 100-day consensus.

ratingsNote.description:
The mean average of ratings for the fiscal dates indicated, where each underlying rating is given a numerical score and then aggregated to a mean consensus -
__*Individual Ratings Scores*__
|Value|Rating Description|
|||
|1|Buy|
|1.5|Overweight|
|2|Hold|
|2.5|Underweight|
|3|Sell|

ratingsNoteText.description:
The mean textual rating for the fiscal dates indicated. The text rating is assigned by falling within the below defined ranges - 
__*Textual Ranges for Average*__
|Value|Rating Description|
|||
|< 1.25|Buy|
|< 1.75|Overweight|
|< 2.25|Hold|
|< 2.75|Underweight|
|<= 3|Sell|

requestId.description: Identifier that was used for the request.
